definitions: A fictional trading card game (TCG) featured in the anime series 'Zenin'.
A popular in-universe collectible card game within the 'Zenin' franchise, known for its strategic gameplay and unique card designs.
examples: He spent hours perfecting his Zenin TCG deck.
The new Zenin TCG expansion pack sold out quickly.
